industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Clean Vision Corporation
summary: Byzen Digital, Inc. focuses on clean energy and sustainable solutions that serve worldwide market needs. The company, through its subsidiaries, Clean-Seas, Inc., focuses on recycling waste plastics into clean burning fuels; and 100BIO, LLC that provides biodegradable packaging solution for the food service industry, as well as all packaging solutions. Byzen Digital, Inc. is based in Carson City, Nevada.
